TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_imuy

S.FORM: tangi titaanku ‘nay wani qibyabas ay qibyabas ay lazat a yau ta taizaan u.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛看到採芭樂的人在那邊。
I just saw a person who was picking guavas somewhere.

S.FORM: ta pa tabunguRanna na tabunguRanna na byabas a yau qi qibyabas ‘nay.
lazat ‘nay nani kyalaanna ti ‘nay byabas a yau.
pizianna ta qibian nani.
S.TRANSL: 他(把芭樂)放在大籃子裡。
He put (them) in a big basket.

S.FORM: alaanna pun kmyala na alaanna ti na.
sunis a yau mzaqis pa zaqis ta zitinsyaan ‘nay nikyalaan na tamana tu byabas tabunguRan na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 把那些他爸爸在樹幹那邊撿的芭樂放在腳踏車上。
He put onto the bicycle the guavas picked by his father around the trunk.

S.FORM: ‘nay alaanna patanan nani tangi nani suRaw ti tapatazan na lazan ‘nay sunis a yau.
mluzit ti zapan na sunis a yau nani.
yau ti ya kaputna mangmu timaizipna ni kmyala tu niqatabuqanna na byabas a yau talazanan.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友來幫他撿起散落一地的芭樂。
His friends came to help him pick up the guavas that were scattered all over the road.

S.FORM: qalisinpuanna ti ta qibian ‘nay ‘nay ta ‘nay byabas a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們把芭樂集中放在籃子裡。
They put the guavas into the basket.

S.FORM: pazaqisanna uman.
S.TRANSL: 他們再把芭樂放在腳踏車上。
They put (the guavas onto the bicycle) again.

S.FORM: tmanan.
kalingunanna ti ya ‘nay qubuna na sunis a yau.
alaan na kaputna bula tu qubu ‘nay kaputna ‘nay msuRaw ay sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友把帽子拿給那個跌倒的小孩。
His friends gave the hat to the child who fell.

S.FORM: wiya ti tmanan sunis a yau.
yau ti ‘nay kintulu ay yau ti qman tu byabas a yau.
S.TRANSL: There were three people who were eating guavas.

S.FORM: wiya ti pasazi ta tatibuR sayza smaqay ‘nay kintulu ay sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: The three children went towards the south.

S.FORM: tmanan ti ‘nay sunis ‘nay mniz.
tu maseq ti ta izaan.
talepawanna sayza ‘nay sunis ‘nay Raynguanku ti.
S.TRANSL: 或許到家裡. 我不知道。
Perhaps to their home. I don’t know.

S.FORM: mai ti nayau ma sikawmaan.
meiyou la.
